message:
feat: comprehensive SQL, CI/CD, and testing improvements

SQL Implementation:
- Add HAVING clause execution in SQL executor with full expression evaluation
- Implement GROUP BY in query module with HashMap-based grouping and aggregates
- Add readAtIndices Phase 2 API (int64, float64, int32, float32, bool, string)

Error Handling:
- Replace catch unreachable with proper error propagation in executor
- Fix Python string lifetime management with tracked allocations
- Add runtime Metal device availability check

CI/CD Workflows:
- Add coverage workflow (Zig + Node.js with Codecov)
- Add security scanning (npm audit + CodeQL)
- Add browser E2E workflow with Playwright
- Add benchmark regression workflow
- Add Dependabot for npm and GitHub Actions

Testing:
- Add Playwright E2E tests for WASM demo
- Add stress tests (large datasets, memory pressure, edge cases)
- Add GROUP BY tests (basic, HAVING, COUNT, AVG)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,27 @@
+version: 2
+updates:
+  # Node.js dependencies for packages/node
+  - package-ecosystem: "npm"
+    directory: "/packages/node"
+    schedule:
+      interval: "weekly"
+    open-pull-requests-limit: 5
+    groups:
+      dev-dependencies:
+        dependency-type: "development"
+      prod-dependencies:
+        dependency-type: "production"
+
+  # Node.js dependencies for packages/browser
+  - package-ecosystem: "npm"
+    directory: "/packages/browser"
+    schedule:
+      interval: "weekly"
+    open-pull-requests-limit: 5
+
+  # GitHub Actions
+  - package-ecosystem: "github-actions"
+    directory: "/"
+    schedule:
+      interval: "weekly"
+    open-pull-requests-limit: 3

@@ -0,0 +1,89 @@
+name: Benchmark
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+    paths:
+      - 'src/**'
+      - 'benchmarks/**'
+      - '.github/workflows/benchmark.yml'
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+    paths:
+      - 'src/**'
+      - 'benchmarks/**'
+      - '.github/workflows/benchmark.yml'
+
+jobs:
+  benchmark:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Python
+        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
+        with:
+          python-version: '3.11'
+
+      - name: Setup Zig
+        uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: 0.13.0
+
+      - name: Install Python dependencies
+        run: |
+          pip install pyarrow lancedb polars
+
+      - name: Build Zig library
+        run: zig build lib
+
+      - name: Generate test fixtures
+        run: python fixtures/generate_test_files.py
+        continue-on-error: true
+
+      - name: Run Zig benchmarks
+        run: zig build test-parquet 2>&1 | tee zig-benchmark.txt
+        continue-on-error: true
+
+      - name: Run Python benchmarks
+        working-directory: benchmarks
+        run: python run_all.py 2>&1 | tee ../python-benchmark.txt
+        continue-on-error: true
+
+      - name: Upload benchmark results
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        with:
+          name: benchmark-results
+          path: |
+            zig-benchmark.txt
+            python-benchmark.txt
+          retention-days: 30
+
+      - name: Comment benchmark results on PR
+        if: github.event_name == 'pull_request'
+        uses: actions/github-script@v7
+        with:
+          script: |
+            const fs = require('fs');
+            let comment = '## Benchmark Results\n\n';
+
+            try {
+              const zigResults = fs.readFileSync('zig-benchmark.txt', 'utf8');
+              comment += '### Zig Benchmarks\n```\n' + zigResults.slice(-2000) + '\n```\n\n';
+            } catch (e) {
+              comment += '### Zig Benchmarks\n_No results available_\n\n';
+            }
+
+            try {
+              const pythonResults = fs.readFileSync('python-benchmark.txt', 'utf8');
+              comment += '### Python Benchmarks\n```\n' + pythonResults.slice(-2000) + '\n```\n';
+            } catch (e) {
+              comment += '### Python Benchmarks\n_No results available_\n';
+            }
+
+            github.rest.issues.createComment({
+              issue_number: context.issue.number,
+              owner: context.repo.owner,
+              repo: context.repo.repo,
+              body: comment
+            });

@@ -0,0 +1,57 @@
+name: Browser E2E
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+    paths:
+      - 'packages/browser/**'
+      - 'examples/wasm/**'
+      - 'src/**'
+      - '.github/workflows/browser-e2e.yml'
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+    paths:
+      - 'packages/browser/**'
+      - 'examples/wasm/**'
+      - 'src/**'
+      - '.github/workflows/browser-e2e.yml'
+
+jobs:
+  e2e:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: 20
+
+      - name: Setup Zig
+        uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: 0.13.0
+
+      - name: Build WASM module
+        run: zig build wasm
+
+      - name: Copy WASM to examples
+        run: cp zig-out/bin/lanceql.wasm examples/wasm/
+
+      - name: Install Playwright
+        run: npm install -g @playwright/test
+
+      - name: Install Playwright browsers
+        run: npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
+
+      - name: Run E2E tests
+        run: npx playwright test --project=chromium
+        working-directory: packages/browser
+
+      - name: Upload Playwright report
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: failure()
+        with:
+          name: playwright-report
+          path: packages/browser/playwright-report/
+          retention-days: 7

@@ -0,0 +1,50 @@
+name: Coverage
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+
+jobs:
+  coverage:
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Zig
+        uses: mlugg/setup-zig@v2
+        with:
+          version: 0.13.0
+
+      - name: Run Zig tests
+        run: zig build test
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: 20
+
+      - name: Install Node.js dependencies
+        working-directory: packages/node
+        run: npm ci
+
+      - name: Build Zig shared library
+        run: zig build lib-nodejs
+
+      - name: Build native addon
+        working-directory: packages/node
+        run: npm run build
+
+      - name: Run Node tests with coverage
+        working-directory: packages/node
+        run: npm run test:coverage
+        continue-on-error: true
+
+      - name: Upload coverage to Codecov
+        uses: codecov/codecov-action@v4
+        with:
+          token: ${{ secrets.CODECOV_TOKEN }}
+          directory: packages/node/coverage
+          fail_ci_if_error: false
+          verbose: true

@@ -0,0 +1,56 @@
+name: Security
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main]
+  pull_request:
+    branches: [main]
+  schedule:
+    # Run weekly on Monday at 00:00 UTC
+    - cron: '0 0 * * 1'
+
+jobs:
+  npm-audit:
+    name: NPM Security Audit
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Setup Node.js
+        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
+        with:
+          node-version: 20
+
+      - name: Audit packages/node
+        working-directory: packages/node
+        run: npm audit --audit-level=high
+        continue-on-error: true
+
+      - name: Audit packages/browser
+        working-directory: packages/browser
+        run: npm audit --audit-level=high
+        continue-on-error: true
+
+  codeql:
+    name: CodeQL Analysis
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    permissions:
+      actions: read
+      contents: read
+      security-events: write
+
+    steps:
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
+
+      - name: Initialize CodeQL
+        uses: github/codeql-action/init@v3
+        with:
+          languages: javascript
+
+      - name: Autobuild
+        uses: github/codeql-action/autobuild@v3
+
+      - name: Perform CodeQL Analysis
+        uses: github/codeql-action/analyze@v3
+        with:
+          category: "/language:javascript"

@@ -0,0 +1,32 @@
+// @ts-check
+import { defineConfig, devices } from '@playwright/test';
+
+export default defineConfig({
+  testDir: './tests/e2e',
+  fullyParallel: true,
+  forbidOnly: !!process.env.CI,
+  retries: process.env.CI ? 2 : 0,
+  workers: process.env.CI ? 1 : undefined,
+  reporter: 'html',
+  use: {
+    baseURL: 'http://localhost:3000',
+    trace: 'on-first-retry',
+    screenshot: 'only-on-failure',
+  },
+  projects: [
+    {
+      name: 'chromium',
+      use: { ...devices['Desktop Chrome'] },
+    },
+    {
+      name: 'firefox',
+      use: { ...devices['Desktop Firefox'] },
+    },
+  ],
+  webServer: {
+    command: 'python3 -m http.server 3000 -d ../../examples/wasm',
+    url: 'http://localhost:3000',
+    reuseExistingServer: !process.env.CI,
+    timeout: 30000,
+  },
+});
